summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of all 4 new features: (1) Partner Orgs 3 sub-tabs UI, (2) GenericListManager CRUD for Partner Types and Industries, (3) API-driven dropdowns in create/edit partner forms, (4) Role Template selector in Edit User dialog. All 11 test scenarios passed successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: GenericListManager.tsx: The remove button has opacity-0 and only becomes visible on hover (group-hover:opacity-100). This works but could be a UX concern for mobile/touch devices where hover doesn't apply. Minor note.
usePlatformList.ts: Module-level cache (_caches) persists across component mounts. After invalidatePlatformListCache() is called, the next render will refetch from API. This is correct behavior.
TenantsTab.tsx: Good use of FALLBACK_TYPES and FALLBACK_INDUSTRIES as fallback values if the API fails - graceful degradation.
Backend currencies.py: _make_list_routes factory pattern creates both public GET (/platform/{slug}) and admin GET/POST/DELETE (/admin/platform/{slug}) routes cleanly.
passed_tests: Login with partner code 'automate-accounts' then email admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123! - OK
Partner Orgs tab has 3 sub-tabs: Partner List (tenants-sub-tab-partners), Partner Types (tenants-sub-tab-partner-types), Industries (tenants-sub-tab-industries)
Partner Types sub-tab shows GenericListManager (data-testid='partner-types-manager') with 6 default items: Reseller, Direct, Wholesale, Agency, Affiliate, Other
Add 'TestTypeXYZ' via new-partner-types-input + add-partner-types-btn - toast 'TestTypeXYZ added', item appears in list
Remove 'TestTypeXYZ' via remove-partner-types-TestTypeXYZ button - toast 'TestTypeXYZ removed', item removed from list

Industries sub-tab shows GenericListManager (data-testid='industries-manager') with 9 default items: Technology, Finance, Healthcare, Retail, Education, Real Estate, Manufacturing, Professional Services, Other
Add 'TestIndustryABC' via new-industries-input + add-industries-btn - toast 'TestIndustryABC added', item appears in list
Remove 'TestIndustryABC' via remove-industries-TestIndustryABC button - toast 'TestIndustryABC removed', item removed from list
New Partner Org modal: Partner Type dropdown (data-testid='new-partner-type') populated from API with all 6 types
Edit Org Details dialog: both edit-org-partner-type and edit-org-industry dropdowns populated from API (with '— Not set —' option)

Users tab Edit dialog: Role Template selector (data-testid='admin-edit-user-preset') present at top of dialog with 7 options: Custom, Super Admin, Manager, Support Agent, Viewer, Accountant, Content Editor
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features from review request are working: (1) 3 sub-tabs in Partner Orgs (testids: tenants-sub-tab-partners, tenants-sub-tab-partner-types, tenants-sub-tab-industries); (2) GenericListManager CRUD for partner-types and industries - Add/Remove with toast notifications; (3) New Partner Org form dropdowns (new-partner-type, new-partner-industry) and Edit Org Details dropdowns (edit-org-partner-type, edit-org-industry) all pull from /api/platform/partner-types and /api/platform/industries; (4) Edit User dialog has Role Template (admin-edit-user-preset) selector with preset roles from /api/admin/permissions/modules. Backend routes in /app/backend/routes/admin/currencies.py use a factory pattern (_make_list_routes) for partner-types and industries. Admin credentials: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123! (code: automate-accounts).
